developer_response.body: Dear Alitt21 - this app is a short, free to download learning experience to introduce labs where cell and gene therapies are made. We are considering an expanded paid-for version that looks in detail at cell biology, diseases and treatments.

reviews.review_description: Really great educational app showing how cell therapies are made with impressive immersive visuals. This would be of interest to anyone learning about, or interested to know more about, cell biology and cell therapies. Really impressive vr experience.
Seeing a day in the life of people who work in medicines manufacturing clean rooms is great and I’ve been using this for outreach to schools for recruitment to our university
Simple and intuitive with great visuals. Really like how the cell interior was realised. Perfect way to get students excited about Cell and gene therapy!
Excellent app for teaching students with. Gives them a real sense of the experience of working in these types of environments. Highly rated!
